-- Insert categories first
INSERT INTO knowledge_base_categories (name, description, displayOrder, createdAt) VALUES
('Getting Started', 'Learn the basics', 1, NOW()),
('KYC', 'Verification guide', 2, NOW()),
('Investments', 'How to invest', 3, NOW()),
('Returns', 'Understanding returns', 4, NOW()),
('Support', 'Get help', 5, NOW());

-- Insert articles
INSERT INTO knowledge_base_articles (title, content, categoryId, status, createdAt) VALUES
('What is Emtelaak?', '# What is Emtelaak?\n\nEgypt''s leading fractional real estate platform. Invest from $250.', 1, 'published', NOW()),
('KYC Verification', '# KYC Guide\n\nRequired documents: ID, proof of address, selfie.', 2, 'published', NOW()),
('First Investment', '# How to Invest\n\n1. Browse properties\n2. Review details\n3. Invest\n4. Track returns', 3, 'published', NOW()),
('Understanding Returns', '# Returns Explained\n\nQuarterly distributions from rental income.', 4, 'published', NOW()),
('Get Support', '# Customer Support\n\nLive chat, email: support@emtelaak.com', 5, 'published', NOW());
